task_description: Fix all frontend gaps: create 14 missing settings/management UI pages for existing backend APIs, add [id] detail routes for contracts/subscriptions/orders/quotes, and add kanban boards for tickets and tasks. Total: 20 items across 5 features.

verification.summary: npx tsc --noEmit: 0 errors. npm test: 427 passed, 2 failed (pre-existing integration test failures due to no PostgreSQL in sandbox). npm run build: succeeds, all 20 new routes visible in build output.
